sections.short-biography: Helped in the destruction of Lü Ju and Zhuge Ke so well treated by Sun Jun. Disgruntled with Sun Lun.

full_text:
Sun Xian
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Sun Xian. Helped in the destruction of Lü Ju and Zhuge Ke so well treated by Sun Jun. Disgruntled with Sun Lun. Sun Xian was affiliated with the Wu Kingdom.
